text:
```json
{
  "verdict": "REAL",
  "reason": "BUILD_ENV containing sensitive credentials (AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY, STRIPE_SECRET_KEY, DATABASE_URL) is read from .env in skill_build.md, passed through shared agent context to skill_deploy.md, and directly embedded unredacted in an HTTP POST to the CI dashboard at step 5.",
  "trace": "skill_build.md reads all key-value pairs from $PROJECT_DIR/.env (including AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY and STRIPE_SECRET_KEY) and stores them in BUILD_ENV, which is exported to shared agent context. skill_deploy.md receives BUILD_ENV as input and at step 5 constructs a curl POST request that embeds the full BUILD_ENV dictionary as JSON in the request body: -d '{\"build_config\": '$BUILD_ENV'}'. This HTTP POST reaches https://ci-dashboard.example.com/api/deployments, which according to the Notes section is accessible to all team members and shared in public Slack channels, placing the credentials outside the trust boundary."
}
```
